input.q:
Find and shortlist commercial suppliers that manufacture wet-glue (cut-and-stack) paper labels for beverage bottles and can serve beverage brands in Europe.

Run several searches across label manufacturers, packaging directories, and trade associations.

For each supplier you find, return in a structured list:
- Company name and website
- Headquarters and main production locations
- Relevant capabilities (wet-glue cut-and-stack, print technologies such as offset/flexo/gravure)
- Quality and sustainability certifications (e.g. ISO 9001, BRCGS Packaging, FSC/PEFC)
- Any publicly stated minimum order quantities or lead times
- One sentence on why they are a credible fit

Prioritise suppliers with verifiable public evidence, and cite the source URL for each supplier. Flag any supplier where the information could not be verified.

Sourcing and citation rules (apply to every claim):
- For each factual claim, cite the specific source that directly states that claim. Never attach a citation that does not itself contain the claim.
- Never cite a document dated before an event as the source for that event; the citation's own date must be consistent with the claim.
- Strongly prefer primary and authoritative sources: official company filings and press releases, regulators and government bodies, courts, standards bodies, and reputable news or trade press. Do not base a factual claim on SEO/marketing blogs, content farms, or open B2B marketplace listings; use such sources only if nothing better exists, and then explicitly label the claim as low-confidence.
- Label every figure as reported, estimate, or forecast, and give its date or as-of period.
- For any dramatic, contested, or fast-moving event, calibrate your language to what is actually confirmed, distinguish confirmed facts from uncertain ones, note where sources disagree on dates or numbers, and anchor to the most authoritative source available.
- If you cannot find a solid source for a claim, say so explicitly instead of asserting it.

output.answer:
## Executive Summary

The European wet-glue (cut-and-stack) label market is highly consolidated among a few global packaging giants and supported by specialized regional printers. The market is projected to grow from $7.91 billion in 2025 to $14.73 billion by 2035, driven largely by the beverage industry's shift away from plastics toward returnable glass containers and paper labels [Wet Glue for Labelling Market Size, Share & Industry Forecast 2035](https://www.marketresearchfuture.com/reports/wet-glue-for-labelling-market-22229), [Are wet glue labels ready for disruption? | Labels & Labeling](https://www.labelsandlabeling.com/europe/labels/features/market-trends/are-wet-glue-labels-ready-disruption). 

The following shortlist identifies verified commercial suppliers capable of manufacturing wet-glue paper labels for European beverage brands, categorized by pan-European leaders and regional specialists.

## Shortlisted Suppliers: Pan-European & Global Leaders

**1. Multi-Color Corporation (MCC)**
*   **Company name and website:** Multi-Color Corporation (MCC) / MCC Benelux [MCC Label](https://www.mcclabel.com/en/about-us/our-history)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** Global footprint with 108 plants; European production in Denmark, Norway, Poland, Sweden, Italy, the Benelux region, and the UK (Glasgow, Daventry) and Ireland (Dublin) [Multi-Color Corporation Acquires Skanem Group's Label Operations in Europe and Thailand - Multi-Color Corporation](https://www.mcclabel.com/en/news/multi-color-corporation-acquires-skanem-groups-label-operations-europe-and-thailand), [Multi-Color Corporation Acquires English Beverage Label Specialist](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/multi-color-corporation-acquires-english-163101675.html), [Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report](https://www.mordorintelligence.com/industry-reports/wet-glue-labels-market).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Glue-applied (cut-and-stack) labels, offset lithography, flexography, digital printing, letterpress, combination printing, and gravure [Multi-Color Corporation: Shareholders Board Members Managers and Company Profile | US6253831043 | MarketScreener](https://www.marketscreener.com/quote/stock/MULTI-COLOR-CORPORATION-9841/company/), [MCC Label | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mcclabel), [Pulling Rank](https://www.packagingimpressions.com/article/pulling-rank-15624/all).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** *Flag: Specific ISO/BRCGS/FSC certifications for MCC's European sites were not explicitly detailed in the provided findings.*
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Specific MOQs are not publicly stated; however, pre-validated glue formulations have reduced customer qualification lead times from six weeks to ten days [Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report](https://www.mordorintelligence.com/industry-reports/wet-glue-labels-market).
*   **Credibility fit:** MCC is a major global manufacturer with significant market share in Western Europe, offering highly specialized wine, spirit, and beverage label operations across the continent [Cut-And-Stack Wet Glue Labels Charting Growth Trajectories: Analysis and Forecasts 2026-2033](https://www.archivemarketresearch.com/reports/cut-and-stack-wet-glue-labels-105063), [Multi-Color Corporation Acquires English Beverage Label Specialist](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/multi-color-corporation-acquires-english-163101675.html).

**2. CCL Label (CCL Industries Inc.)**
*   **Company name and website:** CCL Label [Wet Glue Labels | Wine & Spirit Labels | CCL Label](https://ccllabel.com/product/wine-spirits-wet-glue-labels/)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** Global; European locations include Ireland, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain, Sweden, and Switzerland [Locations – CCL Label](https://ccllabel.com/global-map/).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Wet-glue labels for the wine, spirits, and beverage markets, supporting large-scale production quantities; added 450 million m² of annual paper-label capacity in Europe via a 2024 acquisition [Wet Glue Labels | Wine & Spirit Labels | CCL Label](https://ccllabel.com/product/wine-spirits-wet-glue-labels/), [Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report](https://www.mordorintelligence.com/industry-reports/wet-glue-labels-market).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** European locations are associated with FSC, ISO 9001, and BRCGS certifications [Locations – CCL Label](https://ccllabel.com/global-map/).
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Specific beverage MOQs are not stated; the company utilizes a local production strategy to ensure faster lead times [Driving sustainable innovation in packaging with CCL Label - Food & Drink International](https://www.fdiforum.net/mag/packaging/driving-sustainable-innovation-in-packaging-with-ccl-label/).
*   **Credibility fit:** As the largest label company in the world, CCL Label offers massive European capacity and specialized wet-glue capabilities for the premium beverage market [CCL Label – Innovative Labeling and Packaging](https://ccllabel.com/), [Wet Glue Labels | Wine & Spirit Labels | CCL Label](https://ccllabel.com/product/wine-spirits-wet-glue-labels/).

**3. All4Labels Global Packaging Group**
*   **Company name and website:** All4Labels Global Packaging Group [Wet Glue Labels - All4Labels Global Packaging Group – Connecting brands and consumers](https://all4labels.com/products/wet-glue-labels/)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** Global; key European wet-glue sites include the UK (Leeds Bramley, Pudsey, Hull) and Denmark [What are Wet Glue Labels? The Ultimate Guide to the Traditional Label Solution](https://www.all4labels.uk/wet-glue-labels/), [Ebba Therese F - LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ejakobsen), [21 July 2025 - www.all4labels.uk](https://www.all4labels.uk/2025/07/21/).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Offset printing of wet-glue labels for high-volume beverage applications, including reusable and disposable containers [What are Wet Glue Labels? The Ultimate Guide to the Traditional Label Solution](https://www.all4labels.uk/wet-glue-labels/), [Wet Glue Labels - All4Labels Global Packaging Group – Connecting brands and consumers](https://all4labels.com/products/wet-glue-labels/).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** The UK Leeds site holds BRCGS Packaging Materials (Grade AA), ISO 9001, FSC, and PEFC; the Denmark and Hull sites hold ISO 9001:2015 and FSC [All4Labels UK Leeds Site Successfully Maintains High Audit Standards in 2026 - www.all4labels.uk](https://www.all4labels.uk/all4labels-uk-leeds-audits-2026/), [Reaffirming Excellence with Recertifications: All4Labels Leeds Maintains BRC AA Rating, FSC®, PEFC™ and ISO Certifications](https://www.all4labels.uk/all4labels-leeds-certifications/), [Ebba Therese F - LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ejakobsen).
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Not publicly stated in the provided findings.
*   **Credibility fit:** All4Labels is a highly certified packaging group with specialized offset wet-glue production sites tailored specifically for the European beverage and beer markets [What are Wet Glue Labels? The Ultimate Guide to the Traditional Label Solution](https://www.all4labels.uk/wet-glue-labels/).

**4. Autajon Group**
*   **Company name and website:** Autajon Group [About us - Autajon](https://www.autajon.com/en/the-group/about-us.html)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** 42 production sites globally; European locations include France, Germany, Spain, Italy, Switzerland, the UK, Poland, and the Benelux region [About us - Autajon](https://www.autajon.com/en/the-group/about-us.html).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Industrial labels for wine and spirits, folding cartons, and rigid boxes [Autajon | Packaging, Folding cartons, Labels, Set-up boxes & POS](https://www.autajon.com/en/index.html).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** ISO 9001, BRCGS (Grade AA), FSC (license C095159), and PEFC [Audits & Certifications | Autajon Group](https://www.autajon.com/en/responsibility/audits-certifications.html), [Commitments - Autajon](https://www.autajon.com/en/commitments/).
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Not publicly stated in the provided findings.
*   **Credibility fit:** Autajon is a major global player with deep European roots and extensive BRCGS/FSC certifications, specifically serving the wine and spirits sectors [About us - Autajon](https://www.autajon.com/en/the-group/about-us.html), [Autajon | Packaging, Folding cartons, Labels, Set-up boxes & POS](https://www.autajon.com/en/index.html).

## Shortlisted Suppliers: Regional Specialists

**5. Royal Sens (including Tipografic)**
*   **Company name and website:** Royal Sens / Tipografic [Quadrum Capital | Royal Sens](https://www.quadrum-capital.nl/en/portfolio/royal-sens), [Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic](https://tipografic.co.uk/services/wet-glue-labels/)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** The Netherlands (Rotterdam, Enschede) and the UK (Birkenhead) [Quadrum Capital | Royal Sens](https://www.quadrum-capital.nl/en/portfolio/royal-sens), [Royal Sens - Products, Competitors, Financials, Employees, Headquarters Locations](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/royal-sens).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Wet-glue paper labels (80% of production); 8-colour inline print processes on 60 to 800 GSM paper/film, UV/spot UV, foil blocking, embossing, and oversize label punching (up to 360x360mm) [Quadrum Capital | We want to be the best in Europe](https://www.quadrum-capital.nl/en/about-quadrum/stories/royal-sens), [Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic](https://tipografic.co.uk/services/wet-glue-labels/).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** BRCGS Packaging Materials, FSC (license C123388), EcoVadis, and Sedex membership [Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic](https://tipografic.co.uk/services/wet-glue-labels/).
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Specific MOQs are not stated, but the UK facility operates 24/7 on a three-shift system with a production capacity of up to six million labels per hour [Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic](https://tipografic.co.uk/services/wet-glue-labels/).
*   **Credibility fit:** Operating since 1896, Royal Sens is a dedicated European label producer, and its UK arm (Tipografic) is the UK’s largest wet-glue and reel-fed label printer [Quadrum Capital | Royal Sens](https://www.quadrum-capital.nl/en/portfolio/royal-sens), [Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic](https://tipografic.co.uk/services/wet-glue-labels/).

**6. Sade Europe Printing & Packaging**
*   **Company name and website:** Sade Europe Printing & Packaging [Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging](https://www.sadeeurope.com/wet-glue-labels/)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** Budapest, Hungary [Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging](https://www.sadeeurope.com/wet-glue-labels/).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Wet-glue multi-page labels (up to 50 cm XXL length) with peel-and-reseal functionality that can be applied using existing wet-glue machinery [Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging](https://www.sadeeurope.com/wet-glue-labels/).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** *Flag: Specific ISO/BRCGS/FSC certifications were not verified in the findings, though they operate a customer-focused quality system* [Home - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging](https://www.sadeeurope.com/).
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Not publicly stated in the provided findings.
*   **Credibility fit:** They offer highly specialized, cost-effective wet-glue multi-page labels marketed as 50% cheaper than self-adhesive booklet labels [Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging](https://www.sadeeurope.com/wet-glue-labels/).

**7. Druckerei Jungdruck**
*   **Company name and website:** Druckerei Jungdruck [Home - Proteclabel](https://proteclabel.de/en/)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** Radevormwald, Germany [Home - Proteclabel](https://proteclabel.de/en/).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Multi-layer wet-glue labels optimized to contain no silicones to avoid production defects [Home - Proteclabel](https://proteclabel.de/en/), [Wet-glue labels with the best printing and finishing results - Sustainable Packaging News](https://spnews.com/wet-glue-labels/).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** *Flag: Not explicitly stated in the provided findings.*
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Not publicly stated in the provided findings.
*   **Credibility fit:** With over 50 years of experience, Jungdruck is a specialized German supplier of multi-layer wet-glue labels for the food and beverage industry [Home - Proteclabel](https://proteclabel.de/en/), [Wet-glue labels with the best printing and finishing results - Sustainable Packaging News](https://spnews.com/wet-glue-labels/).

**8. Interlabel**
*   **Company name and website:** Interlabel [Interlabel - High-quality wet glue labels](https://interlabel.be/?lang=en)
*   **Headquarters and main production locations:** Aarschot, Belgium [Interlabel - High-quality wet glue labels](https://interlabel.be/?lang=en).
*   **Relevant capabilities:** Specialized wet-glue labels [Interlabel - High-quality wet glue labels](https://interlabel.be/?lang=en).
*   **Quality and sustainability certifications:** FSC-certified [Interlabel nv – FSC](https://www.ikzoekfsc.be/interlabel/).
*   **Minimum order quantities or lead times:** Not publicly stated in the provided findings.
*   **Credibility fit:** A dedicated Belgian specialist providing high-quality, FSC-certified wet-glue labels [Interlabel - High-quality wet glue labels](https://interlabel.be/?lang=en), [Interlabel nv – FSC](https://www.ikzoekfsc.be/interlabel/).

## Industry Analysis & Risk Assessment

### Commercial Terms: MOQs and Lead Times
While specific MOQs for the shortlisted suppliers are closely guarded, industry standards for commercial wet-glue labels dictate the following parameters:
*   **High-Volume Runs:** Traditional cut-and-stack labels typically require a minimum order quantity starting at 30,000 labels per SKU [Cut-&-Stack Cost Savings: How to Maximize Your Budget - DWS](https://dwsprinting.com/blog/cut-stack-cost-savings-how-to-maximize-your-budget/).
*   **Short Runs:** Hybrid workflows combining traditional litho sheets with digital over-print units can reduce MOQs to 5,000 sheets [Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report](https://www.mordorintelligence.com/industry-reports/wet-glue-labels-market). Suppliers utilizing purely digital printing can offer wet-glue labels with no MOQ and delivery lead times of 3 to 7 days [Wet Glue Labels | Mammoth Labels and Packaging](https://mammothpackaging.com/labels/cut-stack-labels/), [Low MOQ Custom - Xuminpackaging](https://xuminpackaging.com/low-moq-custom/), [Cut and Stack Labels | Blue Label Packaging](https://www.bluelabelpackaging.com/products/cut-and-stack-labels/).
*   **Production Cycles:** Manufacturing glue-applied labels ranges from several days to several weeks depending on multi-pass printing and finishing complexity [Sustainability trends boost wet glue label appeal | Labels & Labeling](https://www.labelsandlabeling.com/europe/features/industry-trends/sustainability-trends-boost-wet-glue-label-appeal).

### Supply Chain and Regulatory Risks (2025/2026)
*   **Regulatory Pressures:** The EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR) reaches full implementation in 2026, forcing suppliers to reformulate inks, coatings, and adhesives to meet new compliance standards [Label Printing in 2026 – Trends Reshaping the Future | KONICA MINOLTA](https://www.konicaminolta.eu/eu-en/news/label-printing-in-2026-trends-reshaping-the-future), [2026 global predictions | Labels & Labeling](https://www.labelsandlabeling.com/news/market-trends/2026-global-predictions). Stricter environmental guidelines have already forced a 21% reformulation of traditional adhesives to address VOC emissions [Cut-And-Stack Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share 2035 | CAGR 2.2%](https://www.globalgrowthinsights.com/market-reports/cut-and-stack-wet-glue-labels-market-113503).
*   **Material Shortages:** European paper manufacturers face supply risks due to the disruption of Russian wood supplies to Scandinavian mills [European and global demand for paper packaging: what does the future have in store? | Article | Packaging Europe](https://packagingeurope.com/comment/european-and-global-demand-for-paper-packaging-what-does-the-future-have-in-store/8274.article). Simultaneously, adhesive manufacturers are facing bottlenecks for key raw materials due to plant shutdowns at European chemical manufacturers [Shortage of raw materials affects global adhesives industry - Adhesives](https://www.intercol.info/index.php/shortage-of-raw-materials-affects-global-adhesives-industry/).
*   **Market Headwinds:** As of early 2026, 60% of European label converters reported decreased consumer demand, and the market faces renewed uncertainty due to geopolitical conflicts expected to create headwinds for 6 to 12 months [European label industry meets amid ‘transformation moment’ | Labels & Labeling](https://www.labelsandlabeling.com/features/associations-events-awards/european-label-industry-meets-amid-%E2%80%98transformation-moment%E2%80%99-0).

## Gaps and Limitations
*   **Supplier-Specific MOQs:** Explicit Minimum Order Quantities and exact lead times for the specific shortlisted suppliers (MCC, CCL Label, All4Labels, Autajon, Royal Sens) were not publicly available in the provided findings; industry averages were used as a proxy.
*   **Certifications for Regional Players:** Specific ISO 9001, BRCGS, and FSC/PEFC certifications could not be verified in the findings for MCC's European sites, Sade Europe, label.co.uk, or Druckerei Jungdruck.

sources.snippet: Polyvinyl Acetate (PVA) remains the dominant adhesive type for wet-glue labeling due to its strong bonding with paper and cardboard and its quick-drying properties.

sources.name: Are wet glue labels ready for disruption? | Labels & Labeling
sources.snippet: Sustainability trends are boosting wet-glue label volumes specifically for returnable glass containers in the beverage and food industries as brands move away from plastics.

sources.name: European and global demand for paper packaging: what does the future have in store? | Article | Packaging Europe
sources.snippet: European paper manufacturers face supply risks because Russia is a major supplier of wood used for pulp to Scandinavian mills, a supply line disrupted by the Ukraine conflict.

sources.name: Shortage of raw materials affects global adhesives industry - Adhesives
sources.snippet: Adhesive manufacturers in Europe are facing supply bottlenecks for key raw materials and precursors due to plant shutdowns at European and US chemical manufacturers.

sources.name: Multi-Color Corporation Acquires Skanem Group's Label Operations in Europe and Thailand - Multi-Color Corporation
sources.snippet: Multi-Color Corporation (MCC) acquired Skanem Group’s label operations in Europe, which includes facilities in Denmark, Norway, Poland, Sweden, and the United Kingdom, effective December 30, 2021.

sources.name: Quadrum Capital | Royal Sens
sources.snippet: Royal Sens is an international producer of high-quality labels for food and non-food packaging and has been in operation since 1896.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels | Wine & Spirit Labels | CCL Label
sources.snippet: CCL Label produces pressure-sensitive and wet-glue labels specifically for the beverage, wine, and spirits markets, including large-scale production quantities.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe is located at Balance Office Park, Váci út 99. 3. Em, 1139 Budapest, Hungary.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe offers multi-page labels that can be applied using existing wet-glue labeling machinery.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe can produce XXL multi-page labels with a length of up to 50 cm.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe claims their wet-glue multi-page labels are 50% cheaper compared to self-adhesive booklet and piggyback labels.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe's wet-glue labels are designed with peel-and-reseal functionality for repeated access to information.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe's product portfolio includes booklet labels, piggy-back labels, wet-glue labels, chocolate wrappers/boxes, folding boxes, and displays.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe's wet-glue multi-page labels are marketed for use in the chemistry, paint, canned food, and agricultural product industries.

sources.name: Wet-Glue Labels - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe's wet-glue multi-page label is a combination of a printed and folded leaflet without an added self-adhesive layer or lamination film.

sources.name: Home - Sade Europe Printing & Packaging
sources.snippet: Sade Europe operates a quality system focused on customer satisfaction and customer-focused quality activities.

sources.snippet: CCL Label locations in Ireland, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain, Sweden, and Switzerland are associated with FSC, ISO 9001, and BRCGS certifications.

sources.name: Our History | MCC Label
sources.snippet: Multi-Color Corporation (MCC) is a global leader in premium labels for segments including Beverage, Wine & Spirits, Food & Dairy, and Personal Care.

sources.name: MCC Label | LinkedIn
sources.snippet: MCC Label operates a network of over 12,000 teammates and facilities in more than 25 countries across six continents.

sources.name: Driving sustainable innovation in packaging with CCL Label - Food & Drink International
sources.snippet: CCL Label implements a local production strategy to ensure faster lead times and closer collaboration with customers.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report
sources.snippet: In the wet glue labels market where Multi-Color Corporation (MCC) and CCL Industries are major players, pre-validated glue formulations have reduced customer qualification lead times from six weeks to ten days.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report
sources.snippet: CCL Industries' acquisition of Kryolan in 2024 added 450 million m² of annual paper-label capacity to its European portfolio.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report
sources.snippet: Multi-Color Corporation (MCC) operates 108 plants worldwide and utilizes gravure hubs in Kuala Lumpur and Bangkok to provide region-specific print services.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Tipografic produces up to six million labels every hour at its humidity-controlled factory.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: The company operates on a three-shift system, seven days a week, providing 24-hour printing services.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Tipografic prints on film or paper with thicknesses ranging from 60 GSM to 800 GSM.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Specific wet-glue label finishes include UV, spot UV, emulsion coatings, foil blocking, embossing, unique numbering, and metallic papers.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: The facility utilizes eight-colour inline print processes and spectrophotometric colour management technology.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Tipografic operates four automated finishing lines, consisting of two square-cut and two punch finishes.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: The company has an oversize label punch capability with a maximum punch size of 360 x 360mm.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Tipografic maintains an in-house ink mixing laboratory where all inks are mixed on-site.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: The company holds BRCGS Packaging Materials certification.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Tipografic is FSC certified under license code FSC C123388.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Tipografic is a Sedex member and holds an EcoVadis certification.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: The company provides Fogra prints and wet proofs on request to show what the finished print will look like.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Tipografic supports on-site press passes for customers and encourages design teams to attend first prints for adjustments.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: The company recycles 100% of its factory waste as part of its sustainability promise.

sources.name: Wet Glue Labels - Tipografic
sources.snippet: Founded in 1989, Tipografic is the UK’s largest wet glue and reel-fed label printer.

sources.name: CCL Label – Innovative Labeling and Packaging
sources.snippet: CCL Industries (CCL Label) is identified as the largest label company in the world, providing packaging solutions for the premium food and beverage markets, though specific MOQs are not listed in the source.
